---
title: "DIRAC: Forensic Capacity Audit & Leakage"
subtitle: "Quantifying Systemic Information Entropy & Capital Waste"
toc: false
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: article
    self-contained: true
---

## 1. Audit Parameters
Adjust the organizational and architectural variables below. This model uses the DIRAC regression coefficients ($112.50 intercept, $8.52 entropy tax) scaled to your organization's specific compensation baseline.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// --- 1. INPUTS (Top-Level Viewof) ---
viewof team_size = Inputs.range([10, 500], {value: 50, step: 1, label: "Engineering Headcount"})
viewof avg_salary = Inputs.number({value: 150000, label: "Avg. Total Compensation ($)"})
viewof avg_entropy = Inputs.range([0, 50], {value: 12.5, step: 0.1, label: "Avg. Entropy per Commit"})
viewof avg_files = Inputs.range([1, 20], {value: 4, step: 1, label: "Avg. Files per Commit"})

// --- 2. THE REACTIVE DASHBOARD ENGINE ---
// This block recalculates everything whenever ANY input above changes.
{
  // DIRAC Regression Coefficients
  const intercept_base = 112.50;
  const entropy_base = 8.52;
  const files_base = 22.78;
  const baseline_salary = 150000;

  // Calculate Salary Scaler: As salary increases, the cost of wasted time increases.
  const scaler = avg_salary / baseline_salary;

  // Cost per Commit
  const leakage_per_commit = (intercept_base + (avg_entropy * entropy_base) + (avg_files * files_base)) * scaler;

  // Annualized Metrics
  const commits_per_year = 104;
  const annual_waste_per_person = leakage_per_commit * commits_per_year;
  
  // FINAL RESULTS
  const total_waste = annual_waste_per_person * team_size;
  const rc_ratio = Math.min(annual_waste_per_person / avg_salary, 1.0);
  const effective_hc = team_size * (1 - rc_ratio);
  const ghost_hc = team_size * rc_ratio;

  // Return the UI and the Plot
  return html`
    <div style="margin: 40px 0; font-family: sans-serif;">
      <div style="background: #fafafa; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 12px; padding: 40px;">
        <h2 style="margin-top:0; margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a;">Audit Summary</h2>
        <p style="color: #666; margin-bottom: 30px; font-size: 0.85em; font-style: italic;">Model Confidence (R²): 0.3585</p>
        
        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px;">
          <div>
            <h4 style="text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.75em; color: #888; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 20px;">Annual Capital Waste</h4>
            <div style="font-size: 3.5em; font-weight: 700; color: #000;">$${d3.format(",.0f")(total_waste)}</div>
            <p style="color: #444; line-height: 1.6; margin-top: 20px; font-size: 0.95em;">
              Calculated capital leakage based on the cost of senior engineering hours absorbed by architectural entropy.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h4 style="text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.75em; color: #888; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 20px;">Workforce Utilization</h4>
            <div style="font-size: 3.5em; font-weight: 700; color: #000;">${effective_hc.toFixed(1)} / ${team_size}</div>
            <p style="color: #444; line-height: 1.6; margin-top: 20px; font-size: 0.95em;">
              The <strong>Capacity Loss Ratio (Rc)</strong> is <strong>${(rc_ratio * 100).toFixed(2)}%</strong>. This represents <strong>${ghost_hc.toFixed(1)}</strong> engineering units lost.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 60px;">
        <h3 style="font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 30px;">Resource Distribution Map</h3>
        <div style="margin: 0 auto; display: inline-block; border: 1px solid #eee; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff;">
          ${Plot.plot({
            height: 300,
            width: 600,
            x: {domain: [0, 10], axis: null},
            y: {domain: [0, Math.ceil(team_size/10)], axis: null},
            marks: [
              Plot.dot(d3.range(team_size), {
                x: d => d % 10,
                y: d => Math.floor(d / 10),
                symbol: "circle",
                size: 600,
                fill: d => d < effective_hc ? "#222" : "#d1d1d1",
                stroke: "#fff",
                strokeWidth: 1.5
              })
            ]
          })}
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top: 25px; font-size: 0.85em; color: #666;">
          <span style="display:inline-block; width:10px; height:10px; background:#222; border-radius:50%; margin-right:5px;"></span> Productive Capacity &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
          <span style="display:inline-block; width:10px; height:10px; background:#d1d1d1; border-radius:50%; margin-right:5px;"></span> Entropy Loss (Ghost Squad)
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}

```
